app.name: Gaokao Admin
shell.officialInfoDisclaimer: AI-assisted decisions. Use official information as the source of truth.
about.hero.description: The V10 frontend refactor preserves the prototype UI and interaction contracts while rebuilding the technical layer with Vite, React Router, Zustand, and TanStack Query.
about.capabilities.consulting.title: AI consulting
about.capabilities.consulting.descriptio: Continue conversations around score, rank, subjects, and preferences.
about.capabilities.plans.title: Application plans
about.capabilities.plans.description: Organize candidate schools and majors into reach, target, and safety groups.
about.capabilities.review.title: Plan review
about.capabilities.review.description: Identify high-risk points such as missed admissions, withdrawal risk, and major restrictions.
about.capabilities.mobile.title: Mobile adaptation
about.capabilities.mobile.description: Preserve the prototype mobile bottom tab and safe-area experience.
about.disclaimer: AI results are decision support only. Final applications should use examination authority and university official information as the source of truth.
about.faq.title: FAQ
about.faq.aiConsulting.title: How does AI consulting use my information?
about.faq.aiConsulting.content: The system prioritizes province, score, rank, subjects, and preferences to generate recommendations. When information is incomplete, it asks follow-up questions for key fields.
about.faq.planReview.title: Which risks does plan review focus on?
about.faq.planReview.content: Review focuses on reach-target-safety balance, missed admissions, withdrawal risk, major restrictions, and differences in school admission rules, then suggests next fixes.
about.faq.officialSource.title: Can AI results be used as the final application basis?
about.faq.officialSource.content: No. AI results are suitable for assisted screening and risk hints. Final applications still need examination authority, university admission brochures, and official filing rules.
about.capabilityMap.title: Capability map
about.tree.planning.label: Application planning workflow
about.tree.planning.description: From information collection to plan generation, then review and sharing.
about.tree.planning.chat.label: AI consulting
about.tree.planning.chat.description: Use continuous conversations to complete score, rank, subjects, and preferences.
about.tree.planning.plan.label: Application plans
about.tree.planning.plan.description: Organize candidate schools and majors with a reach-target-safety structure.
about.tree.planning.review.label: Plan review
about.tree.planning.review.description: Identify risks such as missed admissions, withdrawal risk, and major restrictions.
about.tree.data.label: Data tools
about.tree.data.description: Quickly query score lines, ranks, schools, and majors.
about.tree.data.score.label: Score-line query
about.tree.data.score.description: View collected batch score lines and rank references.
about.tree.data.school.label: School / major search
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you visited is not connected yet or has moved. Return to chat to continue using Gaokao Assistant.
errorFallback.title: Page is temporarily unavailable
errorFallback.description: The current page encountered an error. Try again later or return home.
errorFallback.safeDetail: Error details are hidden to avoid exposing internal information. Retry or return home.

plans.error: Failed to load plans. Try again later.

plans.empty.description: Return to chat to add your score, rank, and target preferences. The system will generate your first reach-target-safety plan.

planCompare.description: Compare reach-target-safety structure, risk items, and major coverage.

planCompare.empty.description: Generate or save plans in chat first, then return here for side-by-side comparison.

consultations.empty.description: Start a consultation from the home page. Later conversations, plans, and reviews will be collected here.

consultations.noFiltered.description: Adjust the date filter, or clear it to view all consultations.

dataQuery.methodology.title: Data query methodology
dataQuery.methodology.description: Query results are decision support only. Use examination authority and university official releases as the source of truth.
dataQuery.methodology.scoreLine.label: Score lines:
dataQuery.methodology.scoreLine.descript: Query collected batch score lines by province, year, and subject type.
dataQuery.methodology.rank.label: Rank estimate:
dataQuery.methodology.rank.description: Prefer rank-to-equivalent-score conversion for cross-year reference.
dataQuery.methodology.search.label: Majors / schools:
dataQuery.methodology.search.description: Use keyword search to quickly narrow the candidate range.

dataQuery.form.scoreLine.description: Query batch lines by province, year, and subject type.

dataQuery.form.province.tooltip: Used to match score lines, ranks, and school data for the selected province.

dataQuery.form.year.tooltip: Query collected years first. Historical years are useful for trend comparison.
dataQuery.form.scoreType.label: Subject type
dataQuery.form.scoreType.tooltip: New Gaokao provinces usually calculate ranks separately by subject type, such as physics and history.
dataQuery.form.scoreType.help: Changing this refreshes score lines and rank estimates.
dataQuery.form.rank.label: Rank
dataQuery.form.rank.tooltip: Rank is better than raw score for cross-year comparison and can estimate an equivalent score.
dataQuery.form.keyword.label: Keyword
dataQuery.form.keyword.tooltip: Supports lightweight search by name, region, or tag.

admin.header.title: Admin Portal

admin.error.description: The current admin module encountered an error. Return to the dashboard or refresh this page first. If the problem continues, keep the current operation path for technical troubleshooting.

admin.error.suggestionThree: Keep the order or case ID
admin.login.toastSuccessDescription: You have entered the admin portal.
admin.login.heroTitle: Admin operations entry for orders, cases, and review tasks.

admin.forbidden.description: The current account does not have admin access. Switch to an admin account and try again.

admin.dashboard.description: Aggregates orders, pending review tasks, users, and share conversion metrics as the first usable Sprint 7 admin entry.
